summary: Completed comprehensive testing of badge awarding system via POST /api/admin/award-points. All 21 tests passed (100%). Badge awarding is working correctly for all categories: Performance, Challenge, Social, Loyalty, and Generosity badges.
passed_tests: API accessible and admin login works
sing_song awards 'first_song' badge after 1 song (10 base + 10 bonus points)
sing_song awards 'five_songs' badge after 5 songs (25 bonus points)
sing_duet awards 'duet_singer' badge after 1 duet (10 points)
follow_tiktok + follow_facebook awards 'super_fan' badge (20 bonus points)
tip_kj awards 'generous_tipper' badge after 1 tip (10 points)
tip_bartender awards 'benevolent_tipper' badge after 1 tip (10 points)
three_nights awards 'night_owl' badge (25 points, sets consecutive_visits=3)
Badges appear on user profile via /auth/me endpoint
Accomplishments are recorded in database when badges are earned
Same badge is not awarded multiple times (duplicate prevention)
Endpoint correctly requires admin authentication (403 for non-admin)
critical_code_review_comments: Badge awarding logic correctly awards bonus points for badges
Accomplishments are properly recorded in the database with badge_id, badge_name, earned_at, and user_id
Duplicate badge prevention is working correctly - badges are only awarded once per user
The check_and_award_badges function properly tracks milestone badges (songs_performed, consecutive_visits, etc.)
Special action badges (blindfolded_master, random_warrior, bar_song_hero, influencer) are awarded immediately on the relevant action
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_badge_awarding.py - Created 21 comprehensive tests for badge awarding functionality
seed_data_creation: Created fresh test users for each test class (prefixed with TEST_) and cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Badge awarding system is fully functional. All badge categories tested: Performance (first_song, five_songs), Challenge (blindfolded_master, random_warrior, bar_song_hero), Social (duet_singer, influencer, super_fan), Loyalty (night_owl), Generosity (generous_tipper, benevolent_tipper). The super_fan badge requires BOTH follow_tiktok AND follow_facebook actions. Accomplishments are recorded in the database when badges are earned.

badge_awarding_verified.badge_bonus_points: Yes - bonus points are added to user total when badges are earned
